backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing user profile management and booking request system with authorization controls, including CRUD operations for profiles and paginated booking requests with admin-only access.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting frontend build error resolution work across App.tsx, form components, admin views, and hooks with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files documenting the Avsarvatika marriage hall application with updated branding, contact info, TypeScript types, and proper BigInt handling.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with warm champagne/gold OKLCH color palette for light and dark modes, defining CSS custom properties for UI theming.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO meta tags, Open Graph, and Twitter Card metadata for Avsarvatika marriage hall, including favicon and social sharing images.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component managing authentication state, view modes (public/admin), profile setup dialog, package selection, and rendering all page sections with proper navigation.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminReque: Admin dashboard view for managing booking requests with pagination, displaying request details (name, contact, date, package) in cards with loading and empty states.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Authentication button component that handles Internet Identity login/logout with loading states and query cache clearing on logout.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog for new users to set up their profile by entering their name, with form validation and submission handling.
frontend/src/components/BookingRequestFo: Booking request form component with TypeScript types for BookingRequestInput, BigInt handling for guests field, form validation, error states, and mutation submission to backend.
frontend/src/components/sections/AboutSe: About section showcasing the venue's key features (Excellence, Personalized Service, Trusted Venue, Premium Quality) in a grid layout with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/sections/Contact: Contact section displaying venue contact information (phone, email, address, hours) alongside a booking request form component.
frontend/src/components/sections/Facilit: Facilities section displaying categorized lists of venue features, amenities, services, and outdoor spaces in a card grid layout with checkmark icons.
frontend/src/components/sections/Gallery: Gallery component with category filtering and lightbox modal for viewing venue images. Includes navigation controls for browsing through filtered images.
frontend/src/components/sections/HeroSec: Hero section component displaying the venue name, tagline, key highlights (capacity, parking, AC, catering, etc.), and CTA buttons for gallery and booking.
frontend/src/components/sections/Package: Displays three pricing tiers (Classic, Premium, Luxury) with features and pricing, allowing users to inquire about packages via callback.
frontend/src/components/sections/Testimo: Testimonials section showing client reviews with ratings, event types, and avatars in a responsive grid layout.
frontend/src/components/SiteFooter.tsx: Footer component displaying brand logo, contact information (phone, email, address), quick navigation links with smooth scrolling, and admin access button.
frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx: Sticky header component with brand logo and responsive navigation menu that includes desktop nav links and mobile sheet menu for smooth scrolling to page sections.
frontend/src/constants/brand.ts: Exports brand constants including venue name, tagline, contact phone, email, and address.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with authentication, handling identity changes and query invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout with AuthClient integration and identity management.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Custom React Query hooks for user profiles, admin checks, and booking request operations using the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a warm champagne/ivory color palette for light and dark modes, including primary, secondary, muted, accent, and chart colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that sets up the root component with QueryClient provider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the default theme with custom colors using OKLCH color space, container settings, custom animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking deployment fix requests, including pending backend compilation errors in main.mo and completed frontend build error resolution.
